nasb.text: If the clouds are full, they pour out rain upon the earth; and whether a tree falls toward the south or toward the north, wherever the tree falls, there it lies.

esv.text: If the clouds are full of rain, they empty themselves on the earth, and if a tree falls to the south or to the north, in the place where the tree falls, there it will lie.

cnv.text: 雲若充滿水氣，雨就傾倒在地上；樹無論向南倒，或向北倒，倒在哪裡，就橫在哪裡。

ccb.text: 云中满了水，就会下雨。 树不论倒向南或倒向北， 倒在哪里就躺在哪里。

csbs.text: 如果乌云满了雨，就把雨倾倒在地上； 树向南倒或向北倒， 倒在哪里，就躺在哪里。
